3002630.name: Dionysus
3002630.description:
Overview

Dionysus is a brand new mix between Pong and.. Playing cards? In this game, you will play a regular game of pong, but with the twist being that you can buy cards to alter your gameplay! For example, if you purchase a plus 4 card, you can add four points to your score, making the game easier to win!

Details

This game is great for people who want to play competitively with friends or who just want a fun single player game. You will be matched up with PongBot, our custom pong Artificial Unintelligence (Which is like AI but not very smart). So what are you waiting for, go ahead and download already!
